calibration_note: This log documents design-stage difficulty and failure-mode review. It is not an empirical frontier-model calibration report.

likely_failure_modes: confusing transition state with terminal state
giving a label without supporting marker or pseudotime evidence
selecting terminal states using marker names but ignoring pseudotime
task_reviews.calibration_recommendation: Use as an initial calibration task. Expected to be solvable by systems that combine domain markers with quantitative summaries.

treating any high-expression gene as spatially variable
